meaning: Train a Grande Vitesse 巴黎,里昂间高速火车
examples: Four new TGV high-speed rail lines will be under construction at the same time.
The opening of the TGV-Est last month marked a huge change of heart for France.
The French TGV from Paris to Lyon, by contrast, runs at an average speed of 140mph.
We had spent the previous night in the castle, after taking the TGV from Paris to Nantes.
At the moment making connections, for example between a Eurostar service from London to Paris and then to a TGV across France or an ICE high-speed train through Germany can be complicated.
